creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch updated libssh to 0.6.5, which was released at the end of April to address CVE-2015-3146.

The changelog can be found here: https://www.libssh.org/2015/04/30/libssh-0-6-5-security-and-bugfix-release/

It includes a fix for the issue that caused the GCRYPT option to fail with 0.6.4 as well.

security/vuxml needs an entry, and the fix needs to be MFH'ed to the stable branch too.
